intent: Create an agentic system with tools, MCP, memory, context, evals and guardrails.
acceptance_criteria: Compiler routes to an agentic system capability pack or identifies missing coverage.
Generated plan separates tool integration, memory/context and eval gates.
Review report can identify missing eval evidence as a blocker.
nexus_integration_notes: Nexus can use this scenario to test agent/tool registry compatibility.
Runtime bridge should return tool call evidence and eval results.
